# pomerium_recording_data_source (Data Source)

Session Recording Blob Data Source for Pomerium enterprise



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique identifier (preferably human readable) for the recording data source
- `namespace` (String) The pomerium namespace this recording datasource is associated with

### Read-Only

- `bucket_uri` (String) The bucket configuration as a URI string. For example s3://my-bucket. See documentation for full examples
